documents.text: AutoStream Basic Plan costs $29 per month. It includes 10 videos per month and supports up to 720p resolution. Ideal for hobbyists and small creators just getting started.
AutoStream Pro Plan costs $79 per month. It includes unlimited video exports, 4K resolution support, and AI-powered automatic captions. Best suited for professional and full-time content creators.

AutoStream offers two plans: Basic at $29/month (10 videos, 720p) and Pro at $79/month (unlimited videos, 4K, AI captions). Pro plan is recommended for creators who publish frequently or need higher quality output.
AutoStream has a strict no-refund policy after 7 days of purchase. Refunds are only eligible within the first 7 days if the product does not meet advertised functionality.
24/7 customer support is exclusively available for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users receive standard business-hours support. All users have access to the knowledge base and community forums.

AutoStream is a SaaS platform that provides automated video editing tools for content creators. It supports creators on YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, and other platforms with AI-driven editing workflows.
AutoStream's AI captions feature (Pro plan only) automatically generates and syncs subtitles to your videos. It supports multiple languages and is optimized for social media platforms.
